signals.headline: **Vance's staff transitions**: Three top aides to Vice President JD Vance joined lobbying firms on K Street in the past
signals.raw: **Vance's staff transitions**: Three top aides to Vice President JD Vance joined lobbying firms on K Street in the past two months, amid 2028 speculation, with positive staff feedback unlike Kamala Harris's team.[1]

signals.headline: **Vance on Iran**: On April 10, Vance warned Iran against "playing" the US ahead of Pakistan talks, offering negotiation
signals.raw: **Vance on Iran**: On April 10, Vance warned Iran against "playing" the US ahead of Pakistan talks, offering negotiations if they act in good faith; he later ramped up pressure, saying the "ball is in their court."[2][3]
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?
Trump announces US x Iran ceasefire end by April 21, 2026?
US x Iran permanent peace deal by April 22, 2026?
